debug_info.goal:
q n : ℕ
lamb : ℂ
a : ℝ := lamb.re
b : ℝ := lamb.im
h : lamb ∈ primitiveRoots n ℂ
h_lamb : lamb ≠ 1
h_a_lt_one : ‖a‖ < 1
h_ineq : ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ ^ 2 > (↑q - 1) ^ 2
this✝ : 0 ≤ (↑q - 1) ^ 2
g : ↑q - 1 < √(‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ ^ 2)
this : √((↑q - 1) ^ 2) = ↑q - 1
⊢ 0 ≤ ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖

failed_attempts:
simp_all [Real.sqrt_lt]
  <;>
  (try norm_num at *) <;>
  (try linarith) <;>
  (try nlinarith) <;>
  (try
    {
      cases q <;> simp_all [Nat.PrimitiveRoots, Nat.PrimitiveRoots.mem_iff]
      <;> norm_num at *
      <;> linarith
    })

simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq]) <;>
                    (try field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq, sq, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg, sub

sorry
  have h_main : ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ > (q - 1 : ℝ) := by sorry
  sorry

sorry
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ := by
    apply norm_nonneg
  sorry

-- Case: ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ < 0 (impossible)
    exfalso
    have h₁ : 0 ≤ ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ := by
      apply norm_nonneg
    have h₂ : ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ < 0 := by
      linarith
    linarith

sorry
  have h_norm_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ := by sorry
  sorry

simp_all
      | succ q =>
        simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
        <;> linarith
    linarith
  exact_mod_cast h₅

-- Case: a ≥ 0
                      have h₁₇ : ‖a‖ = a := by
                        rw [Real.norm_eq_abs]
                        rw [abs_of_nonneg h₁₆]
                      have h₁₈ : a = 1 := by linarith
                      exact Or.inl h₁₈
                    · -- Case: a < 0
                      have h₁₇ : ‖a‖ = -a := by
                        rw [Real.norm_eq_abs]
                        rw [abs_of_neg h₁₆]
                      have h₁₈ : -a = 1 := by linarith
                      have h₁₉ : a = -1 := by linarith
                      exact Or.inr h₁₉
                  exact h₁₅

have h₁ : 0 ≤ ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ := by
      apply norm_nonneg
    sorry
successful_attempts:
have h₁ : 0 ≤ ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ := norm_nonneg _
    linarith

-- This part is not needed because we are using `>` and not `≥`
    norm_num at *
    <;>
